subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Malwañano awamina nangwa kutamina mwepi mu jishimikila? - Ilengele bantu
topics: kushala na kijikila nangwa kushimikwa mu milanguluko.
Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa mo kyafwainwa.
Malwañano mu jishimikila ja pewa asabaulwe bulongo.
